title: When did Gendo say this
wikitext:
[]: When did Gendo say this?             Quote Post by Hassn » Mon Feb 03, 2025 2:16 pm I've seen people attribute this quote to Gendo but I don't remember hearing it in the show or movie. It goes something like this "Menkind's greatest fear is mankind itself" does anyone know where I can search for the episode and timestamp?

[]: Re: When did Gendo say this?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 03, 2025 3:58 pm Something like that comes up in a conversation with Fuyutsuki on board one of the GeoFront trains, IIRC. Which episode it was escapes me at the moment, and which of them said it ditto.

[]: Re: When did Gendo say this?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Feb 16, 2025 5:07 pm In ep 11 he says "the enemy of man is man", maybe it's paraphrased from that. I love how the OG german dub rendered that as "homo homine lupus". Gendo seems like he would be the gratuitous latin sort of person if he were european
